DECLARATION AND ORDER DESIGNATING CASE AS UNINSURED MOTORIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, YVONNE M.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-29-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-29-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-30-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-30-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: AS TO WHY THERE IS NO DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT IN THE CASE. PLAINTIFF TO TURN IN A DETAILED DECLARATION IF CASE IS NOT DISMISSED OR JUDGMENT ENTERED. HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF JAMES L. SIMS IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, YVONNE M.
OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-15-1996, CONTINUED TO APR-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST STATUS REPORT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-15-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-15-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, APPEARANCE IS NECESSARY UNLESS A DECLARATION IS FILE DETAILING EVERYTHING DONE TO PROSECUTE THE UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM. HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-15-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-15-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, FINAL ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROSECUTED UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM. IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL DISMISS CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-10-1996 CONTINUED FROM MAY-15-1996 TO JUN-14-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
